subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up after the conference and for your interest in partnering with our team. We'd be happy to schedule a formal meeting to explore potential collaboration opportunities.

We have the following slots available next week for a 2-hour meeting:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for your team, or suggest an alternative if none of these fit.

Regarding your request for internal contact details: our company policy prohibits sharing internal contact information with external parties. For all official inquiries, please refer to our public website at https://company.internal/contact where you can find the appropriate channels to reach our team members.

Looking forward to connecting soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
Company Team
